text.title: Shadow Rollout — Output Contract
text.summary: Schemas for shadow-rollout.yaml, the per-window quality report, and the promotion decision.

forbidden.pattern: any of latency_delta_pct > threshold OR cost_delta_pct > threshold OR quality_delta < threshold AND promotion_decision.status == "go"

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend window beyond 48h for low-volume features.
Adjust thresholds per intent or per business segment when the acceptance contract sets different tolerances.
Add new metrics (e.g. content-safety violation rate) without removing the three required ones.

list.item: Shadow window ≥48h and ≥500 scored requests with weekday+weekend coverage
All three gate metrics (quality, latency, cost) within thresholds
Promotion decision signed by ml_engineer and product owner
Continuous shadow config defined and active post-promotion
Rollback owner named and runbook referenced
